user.title: Eloverblik
user.description: Enter the refresh token from eloverblik.dk (Mit Eloverblik > Data > Access to data > Create refresh token).

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Eloverblik
reauth_confirm.description: The Eloverblik token for {name} is no longer valid. Enter a new refresh token.

error.invalid_auth: The refresh token was rejected. Check that you copied the full token.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Eloverblik. Try again in a moment.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Eloverblik account is already configured.
